title: Correlation MTM Procedure
author: Lee, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In an attempt to make the valuation of CDO trades more consistent with market conditions, a new method for implying these correlations from the tracer market has been proposed. The methodology involves two steps: implying a correlation from the tracer market and then mapping the actual trades to these tranches to determine the implied correlation used to value these.
steps_raw: In an attempt to make the valuation of CDO trades more consistent with market conditions, a new method for implying these correlations from the tracer market has been proposed. The methodology involves two steps: implying a correlation from the tracer market and then mapping the actual trades to these tranches to determine the implied correlation used to value these.
